case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. ALEJANDRO MUNOZ ANGUIANO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-06-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-06-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEDEVO LEGAL COLLETION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT ALEJANDRO MUNOZ ANGUIANO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED OCT-27-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ANGUIANO, ALEJANDRO MUNOZ
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $994.52 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT ANGUIANO, ALEJANDRO MUNOZ
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ANGUIANO, ALEJANDRO MUNOZ
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ANGUIANO, ALEJANDRO MUNOZ
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ANGUIANO, ALEJANDRO MUNOZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANGUIANO, ALEJANDRO MUNOZ $2,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR OPORTUN INC. ASSIGNED TO JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC
